nodes.name: Egg Scramble — Berry Boost Combo
nodes.description: name: Egg Scramble — Berry Boost Combo | short_description: Protein-packed egg scramble with greens and tomatoes in olive oil, complemented by a berry-side for extra antioxidants. | meal_suggestion: E
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Egg Scramble — Berry Boost Combo - name: Egg Scramble — Berry Boost Combo | short_description: Protein-packed egg scramble with greens and tomatoes in olive oil, complemented by a berry-side for extra antioxidants. | meal_suggestion: Egg scramble with spinach and tomatoes cooked in olive oil; pair with a side of berries for a Berry Boost. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich eggs with spinach and tomatoes provide iron, fiber, and vitamin C; olive oil adds heart-healthy fats. This dish is balanced and satiating; adding a side of berries enhances antioxidants to align with the Berry Boost concept.

nodes.name: Avocado Toast — Mild-Spice Combo
nodes.description: name: Avocado Toast — Mild-Spice Combo | short_description: Toasted whole-grain bread topped with avocado, lemon, and a cooked egg; a quick, balanced meal with an optional mild chili kick. | meal_sugg
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Avocado Toast — Mild-Spice Combo - name: Avocado Toast — Mild-Spice Combo | short_description: Toasted whole-grain bread topped with avocado, lemon, and a cooked egg; a quick, balanced meal with an optional mild chili kick. | meal_suggestion: Assemble: toast whole-grain bread, mash avocado with lemon juice, spread on toast, top with a cooked egg (poached or fried). Season lightly with salt and pepper. For a mild kick, sprinkle a pinch of chili flakes. Serve with sliced veggies if desired. | nutrition_note: Balanced choice featuring complex carbs, fiber, healthy fats, and protein. Per serving: roughly 480–520 kcal; protein 15–20 g; carbs 40–50 g; fat 22–28 g; fiber 7–9 g. Lemon adds vitamin C; avocado provides potassium and monounsaturated fats; egg boosts protein. Optional chili flakes offer a mild spice kick without adding significant calories.

nodes.name: Veggie Omelet — Sesame Twist
nodes.description: name: Veggie Omelet — Sesame Twist | short_description: Egg-based veggie omelet with bell pepper, onion, and cheddar, optionally finished with a sesame twist. | meal_suggestion: Serve with a slice of
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Veggie Omelet — Sesame Twist - name: Veggie Omelet — Sesame Twist | short_description: Egg-based veggie omelet with bell pepper, onion, and cheddar, optionally finished with a sesame twist. | meal_suggestion: Serve with a slice of whole-grain toast or a side of fruit to add fiber. For the sesame twist, sprinkle a teaspoon of sesame seeds on top; you can also swap in a lighter cheese if desired. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich omelet from eggs and cheddar supports satiety and muscle repair. Vegetables provide fiber, vitamin C, and antioxidants; cheddar adds calcium and fat. If using a sesame twist, sesame seeds contribute healthy fats and minerals.
